title: Website audit and enhancement
body: Resolve build errors by fixing merge conflicts and creating missing data/component files, and enhance site navigation with improved header, footer, and sidebar. The project initially failed to build due to multiple merge conflicts (e.g., `news.tsx`, `global.css`) and numerous missing data files and a background component. These issues were resolved to achieve a successful build. Subsequently, the Header, Footer, and Sidebar components were refactored to provide a more organized, user-friendly, and comprehensive navigation experience, addressing the task's requirements for site structure improvement. ---

title: Enhance app with new services and futuristic design
body: Add 9 new micro SAAS, IT, and AI services, and enhance the app's design and navigation to improve user experience and expand offerings. The design improvements introduce futuristic elements like animated backgrounds and neon effects, aligning with the innovative new services. A build error was resolved by removing a Next.js specific file, ensuring the project's integrity and readiness for deployment. ---

title: Website audit and enhancement
body: Add missing pages and routes, and improve site navigation and content for the Marketplace, header, and footer. The initial analysis revealed a mix of Next.js and Vite/React structures, leading to many missing routes and pages that were referenced but not implemented. This PR addresses these structural issues, creates essential content like the FAQ page, and enhances key navigation components (header, footer) and the Marketplace landing page for better user experience and content discoverability. ---

title: Website audit and enhancement
body: Add missing routes and navigation links, and standardize page layouts to fix broken links and improve site structure and SEO. This PR addresses several issues related to broken links and inconsistent page layouts. It adds previously missing routes for key pages like About, Careers, Privacy, Terms, Sitemap, Green IT, and Marketplace to `App.tsx`. Corresponding page components were imported and updated to use the `AppLayout` for consistent header/footer and improved SEO with correct canonical URLs. Additionally, the `MainNavigation` was enhanced with "Services" and "About" links, and the sitemap page was refactored for better organization. ---

title: Website audit and enhancement
body: Fix broken links, create missing content, and enhance site navigation to improve the Zion Tech Group website's structure and user experience. Initially, the project failed to build due to a Next.js-specific `ErrorPage` component being present in a Vite/React project, and a duplicate file. This was resolved by deleting the incorrect Next.js-style file and ensuring all components and routes are compatible with the Vite setup. ---

The build was failing due to a `pages` directory at the root containing Next.js specific files, which conflicted with the Vite/React application's build process. This directory was removed to allow successful compilation. ---

title: Install project dependencies with pnpm
body: Fix Netlify build failures by synchronizing pnpm lockfile, updating Netlify configuration for pnpm, and modernizing Next.js static export. The build was failing because the `pnpm-lock.yaml` was outdated, Netlify's `netlify.toml` used `npm ci` instead of `pnpm install`, and the `export` script was missing from `package.json`. Additionally, the Next.js export configuration was updated to use `output: 'export'` and handle `rewrites` conditionally to resolve conflicts during static site generation. ---
